Our Services

Electrical Services
Across All London Boroughs

Fully certified, fully insured. Every job completed to BS 7671 wiring regulations with official certification where required.

🔌

Socket & Switch Installation

New sockets, double sockets, USB outlets, smart switches, and socket relocation. All work to Part P building regulations.

Get a Quote
💡

Lighting (Indoor & Outdoor)

Pendant lights, chandeliers, downlights, garden lighting, security lighting, and smart lighting systems — fitted safely and neatly.

Get a Quote
🔧

Fuse Board / Consumer Unit Upgrades

Replace outdated fuse boards with modern RCD/RCBO consumer units — legally required for rental properties in many cases.

Get a Quote
📋

EICR Testing & Certification

Electrical Installation Condition Reports for landlords, homebuyers and businesses. Legal requirement every 5 years for rental properties.

Get a Quote
🛡️

PAT Testing

Portable Appliance Testing for offices, HMOs, schools and businesses. Certificates issued on the day.

Get a Quote
🔍

Fault Finding

Tripping circuits, dead sockets, flickering lights — we diagnose and resolve electrical faults quickly and accurately.

Get a Quote
🏠

Wiring & Rewiring

Full or partial rewires for older properties, new builds and extensions. All work registered with Building Control.

Get a Quote
🚨

Emergency Electrician – 24/7

Lost power? Burning smell? Dangerous fault? We respond fast across all London boroughs — day or night, 365 days a year.

📞 Call Now
🍳

Electric Cooker & Shower Installation

Safe wiring and installation of electric ovens, range cookers, hobs and electric showers to manufacturer spec.

Get a Quote
🔔

Smoke & Carbon Monoxide Alarms

Mains-wired interlinked smoke and CO alarms installed to satisfy landlord legal requirements and BS 5839.

Get a Quote
🚪

Security & Emergency Lighting

Emergency exit lighting, security systems and CCTV power installation for commercial and residential properties.

Get a Quote
🛠️

General Electrical Repairs

Light switches, plug sockets, broken fittings — no job too small. We offer honest pricing and clean, professional work.

Get a Quote

About Us

London's Trusted Electrical Experts

AA Electrical Installation Services is a NICEIC-approved contractor based in London. Led by Arif Asif, we bring years of hands-on experience to every job — from simple repairs to complex rewires.

We work across residential and commercial properties throughout all London boroughs. Our mission is simple: turn up on time, do the job properly, and leave every site clean and safe. No hidden costs, no shortcuts.

🏆

NICEIC Approved Contractor

Certified by the UK's leading electrical safety authority. All work self-certified under Part P.

📋

Fully Compliant & Certified

Every installation completed to BS 7671 IET Wiring Regulations with full documentation provided.

🛡️

Fully Insured – Public Liability

Complete peace of mind on every job. We carry full public liability and professional indemnity insurance.

⭐

5.0-Star Rated

18 five-star reviews from verified London customers — our reputation speaks for itself.

📅 Get a Free Quote 📞 Call Us Now

We serve customers across all London boroughs and surrounding areas.
